name: . BRUCE WAYNE . | BATMAN x CAT-MAN
description:
What if it were a Cat-man instead of a Catwoman?

Busy investigating a case about a new villain who has appeared in Gotham, Batman reaches a dead end, forcing him to resort to an alternative option.

_______________________________________

· First: Bruce Wayne.✅

· Second: Bruce Wayne & Dick Grayson.✅

· Third: Bruce Wayne & Jason Todd.

· Fourth: Bruce Wayne & Tim Drake.

· Fifth: Bruce Wayne & Damian Wayne.

_______________________________________

There has been a lot of criticism earlier due to the token count, so let's try a shorter format. Although that doesn't change the fact that I plan to add three more openings later (for now, feel free to suggest your own options as well). Please share your thoughts.
creator: ~Narris~
